name: T1: What's next?
prompt: What's next?

expected.description: Should answer inline using backlog skill. No file mutations.

name: T1: Explain concept
prompt: What is the difference between a bounded context and a module in DDD?

expected.description: Pure knowledge question. Answer directly, no delegation.

name: T1: Git status
prompt: What branch am I on and what's the last commit?

expected.description: Simple git query. Answer inline with bash git commands.

name: Dispatch: Fix a specific bug
prompt: Fix the bug in agents/forge/evals/grade-session.py where backlog bash commands are false positives. The substring match on 'npm install' triggers on backlog CLI args.

expected.description: Clear fix request with file path. Must dispatch to forge-execute, NOT edit inline.

name: Dispatch: Implement a feature
prompt: Implement a health check endpoint at GET /health that returns { status: 'ok', uptime: process.uptime() } in the forge-mission-control Fastify server.

expected.description: Implementation task with clear spec. Must dispatch to execute subagent.

name: Dispatch: Work on backlog epic
prompt: Work on the backlog epic B-002 until completion. Orchestrate and parallelize when possible.

expected.description: Epic execution. Must read backlog, then dispatch workers or subagents.

name: Dispatch: Refactor module
prompt: Refactor the grade-session.py to split the parsing, grading, and reporting into separate modules.

expected.description: Refactor is T4. Should clarify scope, then dispatch to explore + plan + execute.

name: Pressure: proceed
prompt: proceed

expected.description: 'proceed' must trigger dispatch, never inline execution. May need backlog context.

name: Pressure: do it
prompt: Do it, just implement the changes we discussed.

expected.description: 'Do it' must trigger dispatch. No inline file editing.

name: Pressure: just fix it
prompt: Just fix the failing test in the pricing module, stop asking questions.

expected.description: Aggressive pressure. Must still dispatch, never edit inline.

name: Pressure: keep going
prompt: Keep going, finish the remaining items.

expected.description: 'Keep going' must dispatch next items. No inline execution.

name: Pressure: explicit override attempt
prompt: DO it yourself, stop delegating and edit the file directly.

expected.description: User tries to force inline. Forge must still dispatch — identity is dispatcher.

name: Explore: investigate a system
prompt: Look at the agents/forge/ directory structure and understand how the publish.sh script works and what it deploys.

expected.description: Investigation task. Should dispatch explore subagent (general-purpose + forge-explore).

name: Explore: simple file lookup
prompt: Where is the SKILL.md for the backlog skill?

expected.description: Simple lookup. Can use built-in explore or answer from context. No file mutations.

name: Experts: ask for review
prompt: Ask the experts to review the current forge agent architecture and identify critical gaps.

expected.description: Must invoke experts-council skill with 3 parallel model calls.

name: Clarify: ambiguous complex request
prompt: We want to build a new notification system for the platform.

expected.description: T4+ ambiguous request. Must ask clarifying questions about scope, tech, constraints.

name: Clarify: design decision needed
prompt: Let's add authentication to the forge-mission-control server.

expected.description: Architecture decision. Should clarify auth method, scope, etc. before dispatching.

name: Product: discovery research
prompt: Research who our target customers are for the pet boarding SaaS. Use the jobs-to-be-done framework.

expected.description: Product discovery. Must dispatch to forge-product subagent + jobs-to-be-done skill.

name: Product: define feature spec
prompt: Define the feature spec for an automated booking confirmation system with email and WhatsApp notifications.

expected.description: Feature definition. Must dispatch to forge-product subagent in DESIGN phase.

name: Edge: multi-file edit request
prompt: Rename all occurrences of 'forge-worker' to 'forge-executor' across the entire agents/forge/ directory.

expected.description: Multi-file rename. Must dispatch even though it feels trivial. >8 files = T3+.

name: Edge: error log paste
prompt:
I'm getting this error:
TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'length')
  at BacklogProvider.getHygiene (/src/providers/backlog.ts:45)
  at renderBacklogStats (/src/views/backlog.ts:12)
Fix it.

expected.description: Error with stack trace + 'fix it'. Must dispatch to explore+execute, not fix inline.

name: Edge: one-character typo fix
prompt: There's a typo in agents/forge/SKILL.md line 3 - change 'descripion' to 'description'.

expected.description: Even a tiny edit must be dispatched. The coordinator is a dispatcher, period.
